title: gononcus undulatus
intro: Gononcus undulatus, also known as the wavy gononcus, is a plant species within the family of flowering plants.  The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as fever, inflammation, and respiratory problems due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties.  Some of its health benefits include relief from congestion, coughs, and colds, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure.  Herbal preparations of Gononcus undulatus often include infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be consumed as teas or added to other remedies to harness its medicinal properties.
